backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister with user profiles, poetry, dua, and song content management, access control, blob storage, maintenance mode, and user block/unblock functionality.
backend/migration.mo: Simple migration module that accepts the current actor state and returns it unchanged, serving as a no-op migration runner.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two high-confidence features: fixing the useSetMaintenanceMode mutation's onError handler to show user-friendly toast messages, and fixing the mutation hook to correctly call the backend and invalidate the query cache on success.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, and hook.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'Dard-e-munasif' with a favicon and a root div that mounts the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for login, home, poetry, dua, songs, and admin pages, wrapped in a ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentMan: Admin panel component that lists all poetry, duas, and songs with per-item delete functionality, confirmation dialogs, and manual refresh support.
frontend/src/components/admin/DuaUploadF: Admin form for uploading a new Dua with title, content, and optional audio file, showing upload progress and resetting on success.
frontend/src/components/admin/PoetryUplo: Admin form for uploading new poetry with title, content, and an optional image file, tracking upload progress via ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/admin/SongUpload: Admin form for uploading a song with title, artist, and a required audio file, using explicit MIME type accepts to avoid mobile voice recorder prompts.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersContr: Admin panel component that displays a maintenance mode toggle and a searchable table of users with block/unblock actions, using optimistic UI updates and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx: Reusable audio player component with play/pause, seek slider, permission checking, AudioContext focus management, MediaSession integration, and a permission-denied guard message.
frontend/src/components/BanScreen.tsx: Full-screen overlay component shown to suspended users, displaying an 'Account Suspended' message and a WhatsApp link to contact admin support.
frontend/src/components/DuaPost.tsx: Renders a card for a single Dua post with title, content, like count, and a download button that saves audio to IndexedDB and triggers a browser download. Clicking the card opens a FullScreenPostModal.
frontend/src/components/FullScreenPostMo: Full-screen modal overlay for displaying a Poetry or Dua post with title, image (if poetry), content, audio player (if dua), and like count. Tracks view history and locks background scroll while open.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: Slide-out hamburger menu panel showing collapsible History and Downloads sections, with playback controls for downloaded audio and delete functionality for individual downloads.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component that enforces authentication, checks for user ban and maintenance mode via the backend actor, and renders the navigation bar with theme toggle and hamburger menu around page content.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceScree: Full-screen maintenance notice UI with an animated wrench icon and bouncing dots, displayed when the app is in maintenance mode.
Full-screen music player modal that auto-plays the selected song, displays album art, a seek slider, play/pause controls, and handles audio permission denial states.
frontend/src/components/PINAuthGuard.tsx: PIN-based authentication guard for the admin panel that checks sessionStorage for an existing session and prompts for a hardcoded PIN before rendering protected children.
frontend/src/components/PoetryPost.tsx: Renders a poetry card with title, optional image, content preview, like count, and a download button; clicking the card opens a full-screen modal.
frontend/src/components/SongPost.tsx: Renders a song card with inline play/pause controls using a shared audio playback hook, and opens a full NowPlayingModal on card click.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayback.ts: Custom hook providing global singleton audio playback state and controls (play, pause, seek, wake lock, MediaSession metadata) shared across all components via a listener pattern.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloads.ts: Custom hook that manages offline audio downloads stored in IndexedDB, exposing add, delete, play, and refresh operations with local state synchronization.
frontend/src/hooks/useHistory.ts: Custom hook that tracks playback history entries in IndexedDB, providing functions to add new entries and refresh the history list.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for CRUD operations on Poetry, Dua, Songs, and user management (register, block, unblock, maintenance mode) against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebAudioFilters.ts: Stub hook retained for import compatibility; the Web Audio filter chain is fully bypassed and all methods are no-ops, with audio playing directly via HTMLAudioElement.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Urdu, Devanagari, Inter), sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and adds utility animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: PIN-guarded admin panel with tabbed UI for uploading poetry/dua/songs, managing existing content, and controlling users.
frontend/src/pages/DuaPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays all duas in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons, error handling, and empty-state messaging.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Two-step login page where users enter a name and select a server, generating a device fingerprint and registering the user via a mutation before navigating home.
frontend/src/pages/MixPage.tsx: Home/mix feed page that aggregates poetry, duas, and songs into a single sorted list, displays a user identity card with copyable unique code, and handles loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/PoetryPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays all poetry items in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons, error handling, and empty-state messaging.
frontend/src/pages/SongsPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays all songs in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons, error handling, and empty-state messaging.
frontend/src/utils/indexedDB.ts: Provides IndexedDB initialization and CRUD utilities for two stores: 'history' (browsing history entries, capped at 50, sorted by timestamp) and 'downloads' (audio Blobs with metadata). Also exports a getBlobURL helper for creating object URLs from Blobs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params (e.g., admin tokens) from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, Urdu/Inter font families, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 59) describing the 'Dard-e-munasif' multimedia app architecture, known backend/frontend bugs (failed content loads, admin auth issues, audio problems), and the full list of existing features being preserved during a complete rebuild.
